events.name: Women Founder & VC Meetup

events.description: Free NYC B2B community meetup pairing B2B AI founders with investors — exactly the founder-and-investor night the VC/New Media hypothesis targets. Venue TBA.

events.description: Curated $20 breakfast on transforming sales and marketing with AI, with speakers from Zentra Ventures, Cisco, and enterprise GTM. Founders, operators, investors, and GTM leaders in one room — direct hit on the VC/new-media discovery play.

events.name: B2B AI Founder/VC Dinner
events.description: Curated $20 dinner with limited seats bringing B2B AI founders, VCs, and operators together — panel plus VIP meet-and-greet. High-fit salon-style investor room for the VC/new-media discovery question.

events.name: AI Founders Supper Club
events.description: Curated supper club for AI founders — small salon-format dinner, high trust-per-minute room for ICP-1 and investor-adjacent conversations.
